description: Software engineer in Beijing, originally from Chengdu. Guitar player and hiker.

voice_lines.hobby: 我平时喜欢弹吉他和爬山。

discoverable_facts.identity: 我的名字是我奶奶给我取的，因为她希望我将来聪明能干。
discoverable_facts.family: 我有一个姐姐，她住在成都，我们每个月视频聊天。
discoverable_facts.work: 我在一家做人工智能的公司工作，主要负责语音识别项目。
discoverable_facts.hobby: 我从高中开始学吉他，断断续续学了差不多十年了。
discoverable_facts.travel: 我去过日本、泰国和韩国，最喜欢日本的拉面和温泉。
discoverable_facts.place: 我老家是成都，但毕业后来北京工作，住在中关村附近。
discoverable_facts.food: 我妈妈做的回锅肉是我最喜欢的，每次回成都都要吃。

discoverable_facts_en.identity: My grandmother gave me my name.
discoverable_facts_en.work: I work at an AI company.
discoverable_facts_en.hobby: I started learning guitar in high school.
discoverable_facts_en.food: My mum's twice-cooked pork is my favourite.

voice_lines_en.family: There are just three of us in my family.
voice_lines_en.hobby: I usually enjoy playing guitar and hiking.
voice_lines_en.travel: I've been to a few Asian countries.
voice_lines_en.place: I've lived in Beijing for five years.
